description: A land of ice and endurance where the sun barely rises and the cold seeps into everything that dares to linger.
biomes: Flat frozen earth stretching to the horizon under a pale sky. The wind never stops, and nothing taller than your knee grows here.
Blinding white in every direction. The ice groans and shifts underfoot, and crevasses open without warning.
Still glass surfaces hiding dark water beneath. Every step echoes, and the cracks spread faster than you can run.
Ancient walls of blue ice grinding slowly forward, carving the earth beneath them into something unrecognizable.
Hollow chambers of pale blue light where the air bites your lungs and the walls drip with frozen time.
Hard ground that has not thawed in centuries. Bones and roots jut from the surface like half-buried secrets.
Shimmering curtains of green and violet ripple overhead, casting shifting color across the silent snow below.
